song.title: More Precious Than Silver
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D A G D Lord, You are more precious than silver. . A Em7 A Lord, You are more costly than gold. .D A G D Lord, You are more beautiful than diamonds, and .G D Em G A7 D Nothing I desire compares with You.
[V2] Lord, Your love is broader than the oceans. Lord, Your love is deeper than the seas. Lord, Your love encompasses the nations. Yet, You live right here inside of me.
